name: customer_segment_classifier
description: Proxy-label classifier that predicts a compact customer market-segment class from correlated features such as account balance and nation key.
comment: Kept as a deliberately hard proxy-label benchmark: the goal is to see whether simple customer attributes carry enough signal to predict market segment on held-out data.
target_expression: CASE c_mktsegment WHEN 'AUTOMOBILE' THEN 0 WHEN 'BUILDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'FURNITURE' THEN 2 WHEN 'HOUSEHOLD' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
